series_metadata.series_description: File contains information received from hospitals, who have treated victims of burns that are of a suspicious nature.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Continue to maintain and update computer data base until superseded or until record series is no longer created, then destroy by erasure. ; Paper: Retain hard copy in operating area until the information is transferred into the AS400 computer system, then retain retain hard copy for 1 year, then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
